content_of_post_to_answer: Which is correct, mind controls the brain or vice versa?
answer: Mind and brain are not really two separate rulers competing for control. The brain is the biological system that produces thoughts and awareness, while the mind is the pattern of experiences, beliefs, and intentions emerging from it. The fascinating part is the feedback loop: thoughts and attention can physically reshape the brain over time. I’ve written more about this relationship on my profile for those who want to explore it further. The mind is not outside the brain; it is the brain becoming aware of its own activity.
